message.content:
@startuml
option handwritten true
skinparam backgroundColor #f3efe3
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #2f6fff
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #1e88ff
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #1e88ff
  ParticipantFontColor #bfefff
  ActorBorderColor #1e88ff
  ActorFontColor #1e88ff
  ArrowColor #1e88ff
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}

actor developer as dev

participant "DEV" as DEV
participant "TEST" as TEST
participant "MASTER" as MASTER
participant "HOTFIX" as HOTFIX

DEV -> TEST : 1 增量换包到TEST
activate TEST

TEST -> MASTER : 2 测试通过后，基于TEST打tag
TEST -> MASTER : 3 check release分支
TEST -> MASTER : 4 将release分支合并到MASTER
deactivate TEST

activate MASTER
MASTER -> HOTFIX : 5，线上紧急问题，基于MASTER check HOTFIX分支
MASTER -> HOTFIX : 6，开发基于HOTFIX分支check本地分支修复问题
MASTER -> HOTFIX : 7 修复完成后合回HOTFIX分支
activate HOTFIX
HOTFIX -> MASTER : 8 用CMPT工具基于HOTFIX打包换到测试环境进行验证
HOTFIX -> MASTER : 9 测试通过后，HOTFIX合回MASTER
deactivate HOTFIX

MASTER -> TEST : 10 测试通过后，HOTFIX合回TEST
MASTER -> DEV : 11 测试通过后，HOTFIX合回DEV
deactivate MASTER

@enduml
